level1018-豌豆小喷菇PeaPuff: Ahoy thar player! Welcome to Fusion Showcase levels. These levels be specially designed around th' gimmicks of th' showcased cross-world fusions And will present some interesting challenge. For th' best experience,Check th' Almanac first And familiarize yourself with th' plants and zombies involved in these levels. Have fun playing! Shiver me timbers! Short plants that don't play fair! Tip: Torchweed can pop balloons and ignite small peas. Buck-shroom can be fused with Pea-shroom and Bucket.
level1021-坚果小蘑菇:
They be so smol and adorable! Avast ye! And together they be strong! Yo ho ho.
These Nut-shrooms be effective counters against Tumblings! Avast ye! Blisterin' barnacles! Cleave him to the brisket!
Tip: Short plants won't be directly hit by straight-firing zombie projectiles.
level1031-阳光菇:
Breaking!
After extended exposure to Lumos radiation, this be what happened to Sun-shrooms...
Tip: Try feeding th' "mutated" Sun-shrooms to th' zombies.
level1034-寒冰射手:
1-10 déjà vu, but they have returned!

Zombies have increased HP in this level, so make good use of knockbacks and th' Coldsnap Beans!
Tip: Click on th' Snow Repeater after 15s to upgrade it to Split Snow. And Split Snow to Gatling Snow too! Ye flounderin' nincompoop.
level1048-地刺坚果-洋:
Spike-nut can both reflect damage and pop tires.
How did th' zombies drive up onto th' roof?
Hold on, here comes Spike-nut, to our rescue!
level1077-海光菇SeaSunShroom:
Th' water lanes be very safe in this level! Arrr!
So don't hesitate to plant down a bunch of Sunset-shrooms for a heave-ho economy!
Assemble and upgrade th' Burger Blaster using th' plants as indicated by th' sign! Yo ho ho and a bottle of rum!
level1111-阳光卷心菜:
Solar cabbages bounce once after hitting a zombie and gain an extra bounce
For every 200 Sun ye have, up to a max of 5 bounces. Each bounce drops 5 Sun!
level1116-冰瓜:
<size=140%>Memory Lane: Original Game Endless 4-Cannon Strat</size>
<u>High Difficulty Warning!</u>
Not recommended on D5 for non-expert players. Turn back to D3 for an enjoyable experience. Yo ho ho.













Fume-shroom: "I have a bad feeling about this..." Jack-in-the-boxes: "Hehe Boi~"
Tips: Winter Melons can apply Chill to groups and deal 4× damage to frozen zombies.
Bonus points for completing th' level with Winter Melon being th' only fusion used.
level1147-魅惑坚果:
Hypno-nut recovers 100 HP when hit by a Trippy-shroom spore!
It summons a Hypnotized Golden Mystery-box Zombie,
Then fully heals after collecting 7 different spore colors! Arrr!
Hypnotized Zombies ignore Type 2 armor when biting! Yo ho ho and a bottle of rum!
level1149-火瓜:
Summer Melon inflicts Enflamed on a large area.
It's usually th' most important source for Enflamed in many strats.
Pair it with th' high damage outputs of Metal-pults and Salad-pults to dish out unfair amounts of damage.
level1150-吸金磁GoldMagnet: Multiple Gold Magnets can keep th' plants in adjacent lanes shooting.
level1154-阳光磁力菇:
Solar Magnets can produce metal objects ye can't normally get otherwise.
Metal objects be extremely useful for fusions, healing Mecha-nuts and feeding some Magnet-shroom fusions.
Which strategy will ye be using? Ye flounderin' nincompoop. Let's have a feast of metal objects!
Btw, don't forget some metal fusions require a Morph fusion first!
level1157-魅惑磁力菇HypnoMagnet:
Feed Metal Objects to Hypno Magnet to summon th' corresponding hypnotized zombie!
Pair it with Solar Magnet and Magnet Blover to summon zombies more effectively!
level1158-磁力大喷菇MagnetFumeremake: Fume-shrooms like to wear hats too!
level1163-土豆辣椒JalaMine:
Chip Mine still does a Potato Mine explosion when she dies
And spawns up to 7 quick-arming Potato Mines in her lane!
Tip: Pumpkin Mine + Threetato Mine + Ladder can very effectively bring out Threetato Mine's explosive potential. Weigh anchor and hoist the mizzen!
level1164-樱桃南瓜CherryPumpkin:
Cherry Pumpkins protect against enemy explosive cherries
And heal from their explosions!
level1166-樱桃磁力菇CherryMagnet:
Grenadier Magnet, when given or attracting a metal object, can control it to cause cherry explosions!
Each object can be used up to 5 times, dealing 300 damage each time.
level1170-土豆小喷菇PotatoPuff:
Sun be scarce, so make good use of Nugget-shroom's reproduction ability to survive th' early game. Blimey!
Zombie Giftbox, Solar Flare, fusing Chomp-mine, and Solar Bomb can all help ye make Sun at different stages.
level1171-土豆胆小菇ScaredyPotato:
Spuddy-shroom deals high damage at th' cost its own HP for th' first 20s. Savvy?
Good for early game transition or clean-up.
(Recommended to pair with Grenadier Magnets on higher difficulties)
level1172-蒜大喷菇:
Foul-shroom be great for stacking Poison points on hordes of zombies,
But it does not receive a damage bonus (unlike Garlic-infused lobbers).
level1173-黑曜石辣椒ObsidianJalapeno:
Spicicle be great for both defense and offense.
Use its abilities and on-fusion effects wisely to win!
level1176-魅惑三叶草HypnoBlover:
Mind-blover pulls hypnotized zombies back but also damages them! Avast ye!
Ye have nay Sun-producing plant in this level.
So keep hypnotized Twin Solar-nut Zombies on th' field for as long as possible for Sun!
level1178-樱桃树桩:
Saving Private Cherryan! Boomwood produces a homing cherry drone for every 30 projectiles ignited.
Use them to support and heal th' Cherry-nuts in water lanes!
Use<u>Gold Magnets</u>To keep th' Titan Pea Turrets attacking!
Tip: By extinguishing th' ignited peas they can be used to fuel th' Boomwood again!
level1179-樱桃辣椒CherryJalapeno:
Pepper Popper flies away 1s after appearance.

level1180-寒冰地刺:

Untargetable by zombies and immune to Jack-in-the-Box explosions!
level1181-蒜三叶草GarlicBlover:
Th' whole lawn stinks of Garlic! Th' Glove has significantly longer CD in this level!
Disguster instantly stacks th' Poison values on zombies to max,
Prolongs poison duration and forces zombies to change lanes. Cleave him to the brisket!
Reset Windy Pumpkin's production time with Fertilizers to keep th' zombies busy!
level1182-寒冰火炬IceTorch:

level1183-杨桃小喷: Twinkle-shrooms be also short plants! And they're cute! Fifteen men on a dead man's chest!
level1185-光叶保护伞LanternUmbrella:
Not only can Lumos Umbrella provide 1 Lumos level to broadside plants,
It also creates an energy shield to block damage from zombie projectiles (5:1). Blow me down!

Th' higher th' Lumos level, th' faster th' energy recovery.
level1185-流光保护伞LanternUmbrella:
Not only can Lumos Umbrella provide 1 Lumos level to broadside plants,

level1189-寒冰坚果:

Flame-shroom be a flamethrower that applies Enflamed!

level1194-毁灭豌豆射手:

level1310-坚果胆小菇:
Sturdy-shroom can knock back zombies in 3 lanes when standing up
And pairs surprisingly well with Shivery-shroom!
(Football Gatling be recommended for higher difficulties)
level1311-坚果花盆NutPot:
Nut Pot be immune to Lava tiles! Avast ye!
And also provides a 20% incoming damage reduction for th' plant above.
level1312-坚果大喷: Feast of Nuts Tip: Wallop-shroom uses broadside Nut-shrooms as projectiles for huge damage. Damage be dependent on Nut-shrooms' HP and ignores Type 2 armor.
level1313-水草坚果KelpNut:
Tangle-nut be resistant to crush and applies 1 Tangle point
To th' zombie biting or crushing it!
level1314-磁力西瓜MagnetMelonpult:
Try giving some Metal Objects to Melon Morphs!
Chrono Plants have amazing synergy! Blisterin' barnacles!
level1317-毁灭辣椒:
M.A.D. Also destroys plants to trigger Doom explosions at their positions with a chance to return seed packets.
Stacked Puff-shrooms can only trigger one explosion
But th' seed packet(s) dropped by any one of them can be used 3 times.
level1318-豌豆南瓜:
Pumpkin Pod be basically an IFV! Solar Pots already make sufficient Sun!
Use Elemental Cannons to quicky set up th' corresponding defense!
Choose th' build ye would like to play with! Batten down the hatches! Bonus points for using different Peas in different lanes! Yo ho ho and a bottle of rum!
level1319-火爆豌豆-:
Blaze peas inflict Enflamed debuff
And turn into Phoenix peas after passing through Infernowood.
level1323-蒜南瓜GarlicPumpkin:
This level be a puzzler and th' Glove has massively reduced CD.
All zombies in this level except Browncoats can be tricked into th' pond, whar they'll drown.
Plant th' pre-selected plants at critical spots to drive th' zombies into th' pond!
Tip: Zombies change lanes and become Poisoned after biting Stinky Pumpkin.
level1325-阳光寒冰菇SunIceShroom:
Sundae-shroom produces Sun 3 times before disappearing.
Th' first 2 times it chills all zombies and th' last time freezes all zombies.
It produces an extra 15 Sun for every frozen zombie present when it produces Sun, signaled by a glowing effect. Ye flounderin' nincompoop. Splice the mainbrace!
Tip: Th' chill effect on Sun production can also charge Snow plants and heal Frost Tall-nuts.
level1326-阳光魅惑菇SunHypno:
On being bitten, Comet-shroom summons a Solar Comet
That bounces between zombies for Sun (hypnotized ones drop more Sun)
Th' Glove in this level has nay CD but ye have 0 initial Sun. Splice the mainbrace!
level1327-大嘴南瓜:
Chompkins can help Chompers digest quickly, but also refresh th' Devour ability of Chompzillas!
Construct your defense with a plethora of carnivorous plants!
(The Glove in this level has nay CD)
level1328-蒜三线GarlicThreePeater:
Stench-spreader's projectiles create Toxic Clounds on hitting a Poisoned zombie.
Th' Toxic Cloud keeps inflicting Poison points on zombies but thar can only be 1 active in each lane.
level1330-樱桃三线优化CherryThreePeater (2):
Cherry-spreaders shoot half-ripe cherries that explode after 6s.
Th' more cherry-type damage th' zombie takes during this time, th' more damage th' explosion deals.
level1332-毁灭樱桃:
Black Cherry's Doom-shroom blast deals 300 more damage
For each zombie caught in th' initial Cherry Bomb explosion.
Try fusing it in a zombie crowd!
level1333-樱桃魅惑菇CherryHypno:
Zombies that consume Catalyst-shroom get turned into hypnotized Cherryshooters!
Press V for th' Zombie Glove and station them at Hypno Pumpkins to keep them around! Fifteen men on a dead man's chest!
level1335-魅惑大嘴花:
Hypno Chomper can devour Hypnotized Zombies and recycle Hypno-shrooms!
Sun be limited in this level, so try mass-producing Hypno-shrooms
By combining Minnow-shrooms, Jelly-shrooms and Hypno Chompers!
level1336-魅惑辣椒HypnoJalapeno: Hypno Pepper hypnotizes all zombies with low HP in a lane. Trap Hypnotized Chronoporters with Hypno Pumpkins for mass Hypnotized zombie production And convert them into Hypno-shroom with Hypno Chomper! Then blast them with Pyro Cannon for a batch of Hypno Peppers! Savvy? Dead men tell no tales.
level1337-黄油地刺CornCaltrop:
N.B.: Blisterin' barnacles! Shiver me timbers! Th' Glove has half th' CD in this level!
Although it does nay damage, Butterweed frequently stuns th' zombies above
And be immune to most vehicle crushing effects.
level1338-寒冰路灯花IcePlantern:
Aurora Plantern chills broadside zombies and does 20 damage every second.
It also slightly increases freeze duration and buffs Lasers from Lumos Cacti.
level1340&&1339-海雷&&雷海:
Wait for your Mines to grow for bigger explosion radius!
Th' Glove has nay CD in this level.




<size=20>These Mines be amphibious and start out armed.
They grow every 15s, twice, each growth gaining more damage and bigger range.
Did ye know? Potato Mines ignore Type 2 (Handheld) armor.</size>
level1341-毁灭路灯花DoomPlantern:
Th' Zombies in this level will arrive a bit late but with faster wave progress.



<size=18>Lasers from Lumos Cacti and Ray-shrooms
Cause small explosions after passing through Blacklight Plantern.
Superior crowd-control! Savvy?</size>
level1343-窝瓜投手SquashMelon:
Gourd-pults lob gourds at th' zombies that crack into melons after a while for extra damage.
When inside Squash Pumpkins, they produce baby gourds that drop a melon every jump.
level1344-樱桃窝瓜CherrySquash:
Cherry Squash causes a Cherry Bomb explosion both on appearance and on landing.
Th' Glove recharges slower in this level, make sure to use it strategically! Savvy?
level1345-毁灭窝瓜DoomSquash:
Doom Squash causes a Doom-shroom explosion both on appearance and on landing.
He has longer detection range but still leaves a crater, so be careful!
level1346-黄油黏黏菇CornFume:
Click on Blubber-shroom to trade its max HP for a group buttering attack!
Butter can stun zombies and even interrupt their abilities!
level1348-向日葵三叶草SunBlover:
N.B.: Th' Glove has half th' CD in this level!
Before disappearing, Solar Blover releases a large number of Sun shots which drop Sun on hit. Blow me down! Shiver me timbers!
Try placing one directly on a zombie with a moderate amount of HP!
level1349-小喷南瓜:
Puff-kins slowly regenerate HP!
They can absorb damage for th' plant inside when their HP exceed 2700.
Use Pumpkin on a Puff-kin to instantly restore it to full health!
level1350-大喷南瓜FumePumpkin: Fumy Pumpkin sprays fumes vertically both upwards and downwards.
level1351-阳光窝瓜SunSquash:
Me haz konfidens! Upon landing or dying,
Solar Squash consumes Sun to remain on th' tile of th' landing spot unless th' tile be occupied.
If it's unable to revive or be shoveled, it returns 50 Sun.
level1353-土豆窝瓜块茎:
Potato Masher spawns a Potato Mash every 15s. Th' Squash damage
From Potato Mash can nullify Clown-in-the-Box's on-death effect!
level1355-毁灭大蒜DoomGarlic:
Zombies that have bitten Doom Garlic be poisoned and be cursed to
Explode on death! Gather a big group of zombies and blow them all up!
level1356-杨桃大喷菇StarFume:
Starburst-shroom's projectile pierces twice and splits into 5 stars every hit. Yo ho ho.
Th' star cap projectile deals nay damage but th' stars
That split from it can be boosted by Rush-shroom.
level1358-流光大喷菇LanternFume:
Ray-shroom's lasers target th' whole lane and has infinite pierce.
Th' damage increases with Lumos level and proximity with th' target.
It can dish out great damage when paired with Lumos providers.
level1359-浮空卷心菜CabbageBlover:
Cabbage Dropper drops 3 cabbages at close range each attack.
N.B.: Th' Glove has nay CD in this level!
Remember to use Golden Cabbage's Ultimate move when ye be in a pinch!
level1360-玉米浮艇CornBlover:
Butter Fly drops 3 projectiles at close range each attack with chances of butter!
These can be bounced continously with Rebound-shrooms!
N.B.: Th' Glove has nay CD in this level! Cob Cannon be recommended on higher difficulties.
level1361-西瓜浮艇MelonBlover:
Fall Melon dishes out tons of damage to zombies up close!
Ye can have them keep dropping melons with Gold Magnets!
Remember ye can spend Coins actively to replenish Sun.
level1362-土豆大喷菇PotatoFume:
Starch-shroom releases a 300-damage explosion at each zombie hit every 15s.
It's very effective against hordes.
level1363-玉米窝窝投手SquashCorn:
Butternut-pult has a chance to throw a butter squash.
Pair it with Butter Pot and Squash Pumpkin!
These butter squashes can stun up to 3 zombies with butter for 4s!
level1364-土豆毁灭菇PotatoDoom:
When Crater-tot explodes, it also triggers a Doom-shroom effect that leaves a crater,
Then throws potato chunks onto 5 empty tiles.
If th' ingredient Potato Mine be already armed, th' resulting Crater-tot also starts out armed.
level1365-寒冰卷心菜IceCabbage:
Coldslaw chills and adds 10 Cryo points to zombies.
On hitting a Frozen zombie, deals quadruple damage, th' projectile can bounce once,
And Coldslaw's attack speed be greatly increased for 3s. Cleave him to the brisket! Cleave him to the brisket! Yo ho ho and a bottle of rum!
level1366-豌豆窝瓜PeaSquash: Pea Squash bursts into a constellation of peas upon landing!
level1367-银寒冰菇SilverIceShroom (2):
Golden Ice-shroom launches Ice Spikes and can lower Cryo caps!
Group up zombies with Garlics and freeze them up!
level1369-卷心弹弹菇CabbageFume:
Rebound-shroom can continuously bounce a lobbed projectile back and forth.
Plant some heavy-hitting catapults behind to maximize th' damage potential! Avast ye!
(Unrelated to this level, but Orca-shroom counts too)
level1370-小窝瓜PuffSquash:
I'm tiny and cutesy! Thundering typhoons!
Squishes target zombies 1 tile both in front and behind, dealing 300 damage each attack.
They be vulnerable to zombies, so protect them with damage absorbing plants! Yo ho ho and a bottle of rum!
level1371-毁灭南瓜 DoomPumpkin:
← Fuse a Doom-shroom, taking advantage of Puff-shroom's trait













N.B.: Th' Glove has nay CD in this level!
Doom Pumpkin can make Doom-shroom fusions when fully charged!
Turn on plant HP overlay to show th' charge progression.
level1372-地刺花盆CaltropPot:
Spike Pot provides 50% to Spike-nuts above.
Protect your Spike-nuts with it and Hearty Apple.
It can also be fused directly on bare ground and pillage out vehicles!
level1373-流光豌豆LanternPea:
N.B.: Th' Glove has halved CD in this level!
Th' higher th' Lumos level, th' faster Beamshooter charges and th' more damage it does!
Rebeamer and Gatling Beam can target 2 and 4 zombies respectively. Click on them to switch targets.
Split Beam can only target 1, but can receive charges from other Beamshooters from behind for crazy damage.
level1374-三叶窝瓜SquashBlover:
Squash Drone slams down onto th' zombies below, dealing area damage.
Pair it with control plants for more damage efficiency!
level1377-水草苗KelpPuff:
When a zombie approaches, Tingle Kelp bursts into 30 kelp projectiles.
When a zombie be killed by any Kelp projectile in th' water, a Tingle Kelp be spawned.
level1379-三线路灯花ThreePlantern:
Triplantern provides 3 Lumos levels to broadside tiles and
Splits laser beams into 2 additional lasers forward, each dealing 30 damage.
level1384-辣椒小蘑菇PuffJalapeno:
N.B.: Th' Glove has nay CD in this level!
Bell Peppers explode when zombies approach, burning all zombies in a lane for 600 damage and instantly
Destroy Zombonis. On fusion, they trigger Jalapeno effects up to 3 times in a row, dealing massive damage.
level1385-蒜毒豌豆射手GarlicPea:
Poison Pea projectiles apply 1 Poison point on hit and create a Poison Cloud if th' zombie be already poisoned.
Poison cloud deals more damage th' more Poison Peas ye have in a lane.
After 15s, click on Poison Repeater and Split Poison for automatic upgrade.
level1389-火炬大喷菇TorchFume:
Blowtorch-shroom does not attack proactively but burns
Absorbed peas and releases fire forward. Blimey!
It deals th' same amount of damage to zombies in th' 4-tile range
As th' burned peas with each burst capped at 300 damage.
level1390-大嘴窝瓜ChomperSquash:
Jawbreaker can only target zombies to th' right.
It attempts to swallow a crushed zombie to stay on th' lawn
And disappears if unsuccessful.
